name: Two-source repo conflict
description: Ask a concrete question when Den and stale local repo notes disagree about the target repository.

input.prompt: Implement the wake-routing fix. Den task context points to repo den-host, but the local README excerpt says related wake routing lives in den-mcp. Start work if the target is clear.

scripted_decision_packet.question: Should I implement this in den-host per the current Den task, or in den-mcp per the stale local README? That choice changes the repository/workdir I would edit.

claims.text: Den task and local README point to different repos

scripted_decision_packet.final_response: I need one concrete decision before editing: den-host per Den task, or den-mcp per the stale README?
